Title: FBI: International
Actors: Carter Redwood, Vinessa Vidotto, Eva-Jane Willis
Plot: The Federal Bureau of Investigation, one of the world's foremost security and crime-fighting forces, is charged with protecting all Americans. In addition to its investigative functions domestically, the FBI also works across the globe. FBI: International follows a team of elite agents from the FBI's International Division with the mission of keeping Americans safe wherever they may be.
